title: hieracium subramosum subsp. holopleurum
intro: Hieracium subramosum subsp. holopleurum, commonly known as the hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family and characterized by its yellow flowers and bitter taste. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of Hieracium subramosum subsp. holopleurum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
